allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command STM32_Programmer_CLI -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\STMicroelectronics' -Recurse -Filter 'STM32_Programmer_CLI.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\STMicroelectronics' -Recurse -Filter 'STM32_Programmer_CLI.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Out-String")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "where STM32_Programmer_CLI 2>&1 && echo FOUND || echo NOT_IN_PATH")

Bash(sed -i 's/_owBus/_ow_bus/g; s/_ds18b20/_ds18b20_dev/g; s/_currentState/_current_state/g; s/_lastTick/_last_tick/g; s/_lastTemperature/_last_temperature/g; s/_failCount/_fail_count/g; s/_eventHandler/_event_handler/g; s/_isAboveA/_is_above_a/g; s/_isAboveB/_is_above_b/g; s/_isLost/_is_lost/g' temperature_sensor/temperature_sensor.c temperature_sensor/temperature_sensor.h)
